description: Dependable power for clocks, flashlights, radios, and other devices Leak Resistance Guaranteed *based on IEC standard service tests Ready to use for up to 3 Years when not in use Zero Added Mercury and Cadmium Quality Seal for Trusted Power EVEREADY Super Heavy Duty is the affordable Carbon Zinc solution that provides power for you and your family's basic power needs. EVEREADY Super Heavy Duty brand offers a complete line of AA, AAA, C, D, 9V and 6V batteries and are an economical choice for clocks, flashlights, radios and other devices that are low drain. Since 1896 EVEREADY batteries have been providing dependable portable power. For every family, everywhere, every day. EVEREADY for Life.. Eveready.
